---
title: "test_fishtest_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_fishtest_empire.py"
loc: 16
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.97
style_score: 3.71
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.12
---

## Intent
The `test_fishtest_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_sprt_logic, test_fishtest_runner_init. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_sprt_logic, test_fishtest_runner_init. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [sterileAgent.fishtest](file://sterileAgent.fishtest)

### Exports
- `test_sprt_logic`
- `test_fishtest_runner_init`
